generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission consisting of gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox for the robot axis"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, and acceleration inputs for axis control"
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor measuring position, velocity, and current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox measuring position, velocity, and current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CoulombViscousFrictionModel
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data from encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for the robot system structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for the robot system internals"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for low-velocity dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for dynamic friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for comprehensive friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management service for digital twin representation"
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware friction model identification (white-box and black-box)"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through model-based control"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAnalysisInsight, AdjustControlParameters, RealTimeControlUpdates
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardInsight
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for multi-physics friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for standardized digital twin representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model insights used to adjust control parameters for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis between simulation and measurement informs real-time control updates"
]

instance DashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization for monitoring robot performance"
]

instance AdjustControlParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting control parameters based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeControlUpdates : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time control updates based on deviation analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow operates as a passive one-way data flow from physical to virtual, with no data pushed back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing with sensor data continuously updated via MQTT; no specific time rates specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML models, Simulink simulations, AAS, data traces, processing components, and dashboard visualization to form a unified digital shadow for the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), capturing real-time data during robot operation to model wear and dynamic changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data versus measured data; encoder differences used to infer elasticity and friction, with manufacturer-provided dynamics model parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) per Industrie 4.0 standards and SysML for system modeling."
]
